abilities.name: Totem
abilities.description: Use this when you need to reposition your @node-shaman #Totem#. Can replace @node-shaman #Haul# in the cycle.

abilities.name: Bullwhip
abilities.description: This is used to swap between minion targeting and provides a huge damage bonus.

abilities.name: Commander
abilities.description: When casting #[SHIFT]# + @node-shaman #Aura# when commander is available will make your minions less dumb.

abilities.name: Humming-birds
abilities.description: These birds can be released using #[SHIFT]# + @node-shaman #Haul#, they deal significant amounts of damage, but you lose the #Jump Height & Speed Boost# they provide.

abilities.name: Patchwork Abomination
abilities.description: This ultimate summons the Patchwork Abomination that doubles your DPS use wisely.

aspects.name: Summoner's Embodiment of the Omnipotent Overseer
aspects.description: Gives you #+1# @node-shaman Totem, and at higher tiers it gives you an additional @node-red Hummingbirds, overall Dps increase.

aspects.name: Aspect of Beckoned Legion
aspects.description: @node-red Puppet Master gains more Puppets. Increasing the damage potential.

aspects.name: Aspect of Occupation
aspects.description: Increases the range of @node-red Hummingbirds. Good QOL.

aspects.name: Aspect of Motivation
aspects.description: @node-blue Bullwhip gains + Damage, high damage increase

aspects.name: Aspect of Acceleration
aspects.description: Allows @node-red Puppets and @node-red Effigies to move faster. Good QOL!
